channel.title: Machine Learning on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Frank Huang

item.title: Understanding RNN
item.description: This is a serial of articles recording the process that I build my chatbot from scratch using golang with Tensorflow. Why LSTMs came across? RNN 是一种基于前置信息的神经网络，在正常的对话环境里面，有时候我们可以根据前置的语句得到接下来应该出现什么字词，比如The cloud is in the sky，这里我们容易先到sky应该放在这里。但是有时候我们需要很长的前置信息才能得出接下来的字词。这时候我们引进了LSTMs which is also known as Long short term memory。 References Understanding LSTM Networks Recurrent Neural Networks
